name: Find Non Standard Products in Inbound Log

content.query:
select 
in1.Division
,in1.LeadSubSourceID
,srs.LeadSubSource
,in1.ProductID
,count(1) as LeadCount
from
EDW.FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG in1
left join EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
on in1.productid = prd.ProductName
and in1.Division = prd.Division
left join EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
on in1.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
where
in1.DateReceived >= DATEADD(d, -365, GetDate()) 
AND prd.productid IS NULL
group by
in1.Division
,in1.productid
,in1.LeadSubSourceID
,srs.LeadSubSource
order by 
LeadCount desc
